# VP9 files typically start with an IVF header or raw VP9 frame data

# Width (2 bytes)
# Height (2 bytes)
# Frame rate numerator (4 bytes)
# Frame rate denominator (4 bytes)
# Number of frames (4 bytes)

"

import struct

# VP9 frame header has specific structure
# Let's try to create a valid-looking but malformed VP9 frame

# VP9 uncompressed frame header
# - 3 bytes: 0x9d 0x01 0x2a (signature)
# - 2 bytes: frame width - 1
# - 2 bytes: frame height - 1
